mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (exam_name, paper_id, exam_mode, publish_status, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, total_score, pass_score, anti_cheat_switch, cut_screen_limit, auto_submit_switch, allow_repeat_enter, creator_id, remark) VALUES (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{examMode}, #{publishStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{antiCheatSwitch}, #{cutScreenLimit}, #{autoSubmitSwitch}, #{allowRepeatEnter}, #{creatorId}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET publish_status = #{publishStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
